mapper.select:
SELECT *, seller_status status FROM sellers
seller_status = #{status}
AND ( company_name LIKE CONCAT("%", #{keyword}, "%") or representative_name LIKE CONCAT("%", #{keyword}, "%") )
AND created_at >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND created_at <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
ORDER BY created_at ASC, seller_id ASC
ORDER BY company_name ASC, seller_id DESC
ORDER BY created_at DESC, seller_id DESC
LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT count(*) FROM sellers
seller_status = #{status}
AND ( company_name LIKE CONCAT("%", #{keyword}, "%") or representative_name LIKE CONCAT("%", #{keyword}, "%") )
AND created_at >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00')
AND created_at <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sellers ( user_id, company_name, business_number, representative_name, opening_date, business_address ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{company_name}, #{business_number}, #{representative_name}, #{opening_date}, #{business_address} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sellers SET company_name = #{company_name}, business_number = #{business_number}, representative_name = #{representative_name}, opening_date = #{opening_date}, business_address = #{business_address} WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'PAID' THEN 1 END) AS newOrderCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'PREPARING' THEN 1 END) AS preparingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'SHIPPING' THEN 1 END) AS shippingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 END) AS deliveredCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'CONFIRMED' THEN 1 END) AS confirmedCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN oi.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 END) AS cancelledCount FROM order_items oi

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'PAID' THEN o.order_id END) AS newOrderCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'PREPARING' THEN o.order_id END) AS preparingCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'SHIPPING' THEN o.order_id END) AS shippingCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'DELIVERED' THEN o.order_id END) AS deliveredCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'RETURN_EXCHANGE' THEN o.order_id END) AS returnExchangeCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'CANCELLED' THEN o.order_id END) AS cancelledCount FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id}

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' AND stock > 0 THEN 1 END) AS onSaleCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'APPROVED' AND stock = 0 THEN 1 END) AS outOfStockCount FROM products WHERE seller_id = #{seller_id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qnas q JOIN products p ON p.product_id = q.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id} AND q.answered_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON p.product_id = r.product_id WHERE p.seller_id = #{seller_id}

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.option_id, oi.price, oi.quantity, oi.status, oi.confirmed_at, oi.updated_at,
p.name AS productName, p.image_l AS imageL,
po.option_name AS option_name, IFNULL(po.option_price, 0) AS option_price,
(oi.price * oi.quantity) AS subtotalAmount
FROM order_items oi
JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id
LEFT JOIN product_options po ON po.option_id = oi.option_id
WHERE oi.order_id = #{order_id} AND p.seller_id = #{seller_id}
ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders o SET o.status = #{status}, o.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE o.order_id = #{order_id} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = o.order_id AND p.seller_id = #{seller_id} )
mapper.select: SELECT s.seller_id, s.user_id, s.company_name, s.business_number, s.representative_name, s.opening_date, s.business_address, u.photo_name, IFNULL(AVG(r.rating), 0) AS review_avg, COUNT(DISTINCT r.review_id) AS review_count, COUNT(DISTINCT f.product_id) AS product_favorite_count FROM sellers s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN products p ON p.seller_id = s.seller_id LEFT JOIN reviews r ON r.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN favorites f ON f.product_id = p.product_id WHERE s.seller_id = #{seller_id} GROUP BY s.seller_id, s.user_id, s.company_name, s.business_number, s.representative_name, s.opening_date, s.business_address, u.photo_name
